title: manihot esculenta
intro: Manihot esculenta, also known as the cassava or yuca plant, is a tropical shrub native to South America, characterized by its thick, edible roots and leaves. The medicinal properties of Manihot esculenta include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming cassava root and leaves include lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and providing essential vitamins and minerals such as vitamin C and potassium. Cassava root can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, powder, and capsules, as well as being consumed as a starchy food in its raw or cooked form.
